\tzpentry{ID5820}{Greens Function Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5820 introduces Greens Function Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{G}_{\mu\nu}^{\text{acc}}[t] = \int_{-\infty}^t T^{\alpha\beta}(\tau) \mathcal{P}_{\mu\nu\alpha\beta}(t-\tau) d\tau$
\]
